common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Only available for Brazil sellers. Use this API to upload KML file for shop level serviceability setting for BR Entrega Turbo channel (Channel ID: 90026). Please note that multiple Outlet Shops under the same Mart Shop cannot have overlapping service areas.

request_params.description:
The .kml file to be uploaded to denote the serviceability area of the shops.


Note: Please refer to “KML file format for v2.logistics.upload_serviceable_polygon” to understand the structure specifications and upload requirements for KML files.
request_params.name: file

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
response_params.sample: File size exceeds max allowable size.

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

children.description: Use the task_id to call v2.logistics.check_polygon_update_status to check if the upload job has been completed.
children.name: task_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/upload_polygon?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => array('file'=> new CURLFILE('/path/to/file') /* Replace with actual file path */),
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: multipart/form-data'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/upload_polygon?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp' \
--form 'file=@"/path/to/file"'  #replace the sample path with your file path

value.message: File size exceeds max allowable size.
